headline: Pop Mart Stock Tumbles on Fading Labubu Hype
summary: Pop Mart posted blockbuster earnings thanks to a global craze for its ugly-cute Labubu dolls. The question now is if it can keep churning out hits. Many investors appeared skeptical about that Wednesday, sending the stock tumbling more than 22%.
